title: Intent
description: Canonical schema for the intent artifact — the operator's crystallized intent at the session seed. Version 1.0.0. commons is the spec authority; INTENT.md carries the governing prose and ADR-0005 describes the system-conventions pattern under which this lives. When this schema and INTENT.md disagree, INTENT.md is authoritative.

source.description: Where this came from (operator, user report, automated detection).

references.description: Typed pointers the runtime may resolve to derive the entry route.

kind.description: What kind of referent the opaque ref names.

ref.description: Opaque reference string. Commons does not decompose provider coordinates.
